expertAssessments.rationale: The standard five-question conversational QA passed on production Cloud Run direct API, including alias resolution and Q5 contextual follow-up.

Langfuse and Cloud Run monitoring endpoints are healthy and recent supervisor traces are visible, but the new codex-std5 direct deterministic session was not visible within 30s; this is recorded as a non-blocking targeted-run observability note.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Use the Vercel stream UI path if release-facing trace proof for this exact session is required.
